---
title: "AGENTS guide"
description: "Agent integration guide for Claude Code, Codex, and other IDE agents working in the UIAO repository."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
at the repository root. `CLAUDE.md` is a thin stub that points to the same
file — they are not separately maintained.
:::

{{< include ../../AGENTS.md >}}
